TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_gaga_psani_’_skura_yow_na_gaga_h’ilan, title = gaga_psani_’_skura_yow_na_gaga_h’ilan, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/gaga_psani_’_skura_yow_na_gaga_h’ilan} }

S.FORM: gaga psani ' skura yow na gaga h'ilan te utux, piyux wa mhoyin utux alang ga, siga musa hkani binah na kki'an utux alang naha. te saying mhoyin cyoli' haca ga hala hm'un ryax haca, ini hngu'un laga, mulu ya'ih yow, kyaku gbyan hnu'yil ga si ga hng'un sasan cugan. te tugal hn'ilan Sali, siga mbahing utux Sali, tugan ryax ini htuw tanux musa mtiyow, ini usa mluyak rgyax uy.

gaga psani ' skura yow na gaga h'ilan te utux, piyux wa mhoyin utux alang ga, siga musa hkani binah na kki'an utux alang naha. te saying mhoyin cyoli' haca ga hala hm'un ryax haca, ini hngu'un laga, mulu ya'ih yow, kyaku gbyan hnu'yil ga si ga hng'un sasan cugan. te tugal hn'ilan Sali, siga mbahing utux Sali, tugan ryax ini htuw tanux musa mtiyow, ini usa mluyak rgyax uy.
S.PHON: ɣaɣa ps~ɕani ʔ s~ɕkura jow na ɣaɣa ħʔilan te utux, pijux wa mħojin utux alaŋ ɣa, s~ɕiɣa mus~ɕa ħkani βinaħ na kkiʔan utux alaŋ naħa. te s~ɕajiŋ mħojin ʦ~ʨjoliʔ ħaʦ~ʨa ɣa ħala ħmʔun rjax ħaʦ~ʨa, ini ħŋuʔun laɣa, mulu jaʔiħ jow, kjaku ɣβjan ħnuʔjil ɣa s~ɕi ɣa ħŋʔun s~ɕas~ɕan ʦ~ʨuɣan. te tuɣal ħnʔilan s~ɕali, s~ɕiɣa mβaħiŋ utux s~ɕali, tuɣan rjax ini ħtuw tanux mus~ɕa mtijow, ini us~ɕa mlujak rɣjax uj.
